title: Pop-up Emotes Online Addon
description: Pop-up Emotes addon that lets you use and see emotes on vanilla servers
body:
An addon that lets you use and see emotes of [Pop-up Emotes](https://modrinth.com/mod/pop-up-emotes) mod on vanilla servers (or on any server without the main mod on the server side).

Requires [Pop-up Emotes](https://modrinth.com/mod/pop-up-emotes) 1.4.6 and above.

- Forge version requires [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge).
- Fabric version requires [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin).

![asdasd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJtfQ4CV/images/a607651b814d59221f265f3bd30467e29e9e3458.png)
